ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Status Report Or Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-16-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gilbert Jay for and with James Hundon.

Mr. Jay reported that the petition was filed this morning and that the hearing is set for June 8, 2015. The status on filing status report, etc., and the order of status hearing are taken off calendar.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Mar-16-2015 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Status Report Or Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-26-2015 Continued To Mar-16-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor and the Attorney to appear on March 16, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the status report or petition to close the estate has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Wan. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Status Report Or Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-12-2015 Continued To Jan-26-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Status Report Or Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-08-2014 Continued To Jan-12-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gilbert Jay for James Hundon.

Mr. Jay stated that the primary Beneficiary passed away and that there are no assets they are concerned about. Status on filing of status report or close of estate was continued to January 12, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy McConoco. (Not Reported)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Sep-08-2014 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Status Report Or Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-04-2014 Continued To Sep-08-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney to appear on September 8, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why a status report or petition closing the estate the has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy McConico. (Not Reported)

Petition For Confirmation And Approval Of Settlement Of Litigation Related To Estate And Payment Thereof
Off Calendar Feb-03-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gilbert Jay for James Hundon.

Mr. Jay stated that he too has issue with this Court having jurisdiction to approve the settlement, but that the request for permission to pay the settlement amount out of the Estate is under this Court's jurisdiction. Mr. Jay also stated that the inventory was filed this morning (endorsed copy provided). The Petition for Confirmation and Approval of Settlement, etc. was taken under submission.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
